raw_consumer_statement: We were contacted our card was compromised XX/XX/XXXX. I went over all charges at that time with the person who contacted us of the fraudulent charges at that time. I have battled for months concerning 2 each, for charges of {$490.00} XXXX and Barclay finally credited those charges. Now, my current statement is showing 3 other charges that I went over with their representative at the time of those charges, stating they were not ours. They were taken off and now placed back on. Barclay told us my card info was stolen from my XXXX XXXX  XX/XX/XXXX. This thief started with small charges starting on XX/XX/XXXX, which Barclay also finally credited. Then, 3 charges I disputed were then charged on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$8.00}, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXp {$38.00} and XXXX XXXX {$28.00}. They started with small charges and went on XX/XX/XXXX for a spending spree upward of {$5000.00}. Their Fraudulent Department is incompetent on their investigations. So, again, I have these 3 charges put back on my statement that we owe.
